title: Admin System Mobile Preview Update Request
description: Request a MOBILE-PREVIEW-only update (or enable/bootstrap) for the CURRENT instance. The selfhelp-mobile-preview web image ships independently of the core and is stateless, so there is no migration-risk field. Requesting it onto an instance that has none yet is the enable/bootstrap path (the SelfHelp Manager provisions the container). Intentionally has NO instance_id: the backend derives and verifies the instance identity server-side, so the browser can never target a different instance. additionalProperties:false rejects any instance_id (or other unknown field).

target_version.description: Mobile-preview version to update this instance to (or provision).

preflight_id.description: Id of the mobile-preview preflight the operator reviewed. The backend recomputes the preflight server-side regardless.
